Pariprashnena — Q&A Archive

A read-only archive of 1,235 questions and 14,977 answers from a Gauḍīya Vaiṣṇava forum (2007–2012).

Asvatthama as the New and next Vyasadeva?

Philosophy · asked by user [] · 2010-02-05 · 6 answers
A book worm friend of mine told me the pastime, but he cannot remember where he had read it. There is mention of it here. http://www.veda.harekrsna.cz/encyclopedia/avatars.htm but I was hoping for more details, perhaps Veda you know the reference of the pastime.
user [38] · 2010-02-06
The ref is there: Visnu Purana 3.3 - 3.4.5. I dont know about details. SB 8.13.15-16 says that Asvatthama is one of the future saptarsis in 8th manvantara.
user [149] · 2010-02-06
Yes, Vishnu Purana Book, chapter 3, verse 20 specifically says that Drauni, (the son of Drona) will be the next Vyasa.

The context is that Maitreya Rsi has asked Parashara Muni to explain the divisions of the Vedas in the different ages. Parashara Muni lists the 28 Vyasas in the 28 Dvapara-yugas so far and names Drauni as the next (29th). Parashara Muni emphasises a point in the beginning of chapter 4 that the 28th Vyasa, Krishna Dvaipayana, is Narayana Himself: "....for who else on earth could have composed the Mahabharata?"(3.4, verse 5)
user [482] · 2010-02-06
1. I have also heard that he was he was immortal - is this info also from Visnu Purana ?
2. Where can I get a good translation of visnu purana ?
user [38] · 2010-02-06
Ciranjiva means long lived, not exactly immortal. http://www.veda.harekrsna.cz/encyclopedia/general.htm#6

VP online: http://sacred-texts.com/hin/vp/index.htm
I dont know if its good though.
user [483] · 2010-02-08
caitanya-mauc0u7749 gale ihu257 likhiyu257 che sthu257 ne-sthu257 ne
satya kahena,'97'92u257 ge vyu257 sa kariba varu7751 ane'92

Translation: u346 ru299 la Vu7771 ndu257 vana du257 sa u7788 hu257 kura has stated in many places the factual truth that in the future, Vyu257 sadeva will describe Lord Caitanyas pastimes elaborately. (CC Antya 20.87)

bhaviu7779 ye ha pare cu257 pi drauu7751 ir vyu257 so bhaviu7779 yati (Vishnu Puru257 u7751 a, Part 3, Chapter 3 Verse 21)

Translation: Au347 vatthu257 ma will be the next vyu257 sa
user [248] · 2010-02-09
whatever book that my friend had read described Asvatthama hearing Lord Krishna glories from the mouths of parrots and more specific details were given. If he is able to remember Ill share it here.
